option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "name": "pt-fanfuel", "private": true, "version": "0.0.1", "type": "module", "scripts": { "dev": "vite dev", "build": "vite build", "preview": "vite preview", "prepare": "svelte-kit sync || echo ''", "check": "svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json", "check:watch": "svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch" }, "devDependencies": { "@sveltejs/adapter-auto": "^7.0.1", "@sveltejs/kit": "^2.57.0", "@sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte": "^7.0.0", "dotenv": "^17.4.2", "svelte": "^5.55.2", "svelte-check": "^4.4.6", "tsx": "^4.21.0", "typescript": "^6.0.2", "vite": "^8.0.7" }, "dependencies": { "mongodb": "^7.2.0" } }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "name": "pt-fanfuel", "private": true, "version": "0.0.1", "type": "module", "scripts": { "dev": "vite dev", "build": "vite build", "preview": "vite preview", "prepare": "svelte-kit sync || echo ''", "check": "svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json", "check:watch": "svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch", "seed": "tsx scripts/seed.ts", "seed": "tsx scripts/seed.ts" }, "devDependencies": { "@sveltejs/adapter-auto": "^7.0.1", "@sveltejs/kit": "^2.57.0", "@sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte": "^7.0.0", "dotenv": "^17.4.2", "svelte": "^5.55.2", "svelte-check": "^4.4.6", "tsx": "^4.21.0", "typescript": "^6.0.2", "vite": "^8.0.7" }, "dependencies": { "mongodb": "^7.2.0" } }

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
FanFuel
{#each navItems as item} {item.label} {/each}

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<script lang="ts">
	import favicon from '$lib/assets/favicon.svg';

	let { children } = $props();
</script>

<svelte:head>
	<link rel="icon" href={favicon} />
</svelte:head>

{@render children()}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<script lang="ts">
	import favicon from '$lib/assets/favicon.svg';
	import Header from '$lib/components/Header.svelte';
	import '../app.css';

	let { children } = $props();
</script>

<svelte:head>
	<link rel="icon" href={favicon} />
</svelte:head>

<Header />
<main>
	{@render children()}
</main>

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
Welcome to SvelteKit

Visit svelte.dev/docs/kit to read the documentation

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
{data.headerMessage}

Fuel your performance with the right nutrition and training.

Today's Meals

{#if data.meals.length > 0} {#each data.meals as meal}
{meal.mealType}

{meal.title}

View Recipe
{/each} {:else}

No meals planned for today. Add some in the Learn section!

{/if}
